name: author retry nudge explains scene-coupled pressure ladder repair

source.purpose: Regression coverage for live Author 502s where both attempts fail only because pressure_ladder[i].trigger_condition names a scene object or location instead of an entity-level action.

errors: pressure_ladder[2].trigger_condition is scene-coupled; bind it to an entity-level action instead
containsAll: Use kind "location_objective" only when the location is the durable objective anchor
Bind ordinary triggers to entity-level action, choice, claim, refusal, disclosure, or faction move
Good: "When a trusted NPC refuses another NPC in front of a witness who can still choose sides."
Bad: "When the PC blocks an exit from the record room."

retryableErrors: pressure_ladder[2].trigger_condition is scene-coupled; bind it to an entity-level action instead
